    private PseudoComponentCombiner.PseudoComponentContribution
    PseudoComponentCombiner.PseudoComponentContribution.scaledByMass(double factor)
    Returns a copy of this contribution with its mole amount (and hence mass) scaled by the given factor.

    private static List<PseudoComponentCombiner.PseudoComponentContribution>
    PseudoComponentCombiner.buildWeightedImaginaryPool(List<PseudoComponentCombiner.FluidExtraction> extractions, double[] weights)
    Build the imaginary composition used to derive the shared cut grid for a common slate.
    private static List<PseudoComponentCombiner.PseudoComponentContribution>
    PseudoComponentCombiner.delumpContributions(List<PseudoComponentCombiner.PseudoComponentContribution> sourcePseudoComponents, int resolution)
    Split each coarse source pseudo-component into a grid of finer single-carbon-number (SCN) sub-fractions that conserve the parent moles and mass exactly.
